problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Bacteriophage surface display for targeting — specifically Bacteriophage surface display — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
